messages.content:
"I will design a world class wordmark"
your version title
"Crafting a Premier Wordmark Design"

Ben Birinci Sınıf Marka İşareti Tasarımı Hazırlayacağım
change english translate
"I Will Prepare a First-Class Brand Mark Design"

Splendid wordmark. For a strong and ready-to-grow startup.
other vversion
"Exquisite Wordmark. Tailored for a Robust and Growth-Eager Startup."

Wordmark + Brand guidelines For a startup that has multiple designers, seeking to expand.
your version
"Wordmark and Brand Guidelines: Catering to a Design-Rich Startup Poised for Expansion"

Wordmark + brand guidelines + animation. For a larger, startup seeking to go global.
your version
"Wordmark, Brand Guidelines, and Animation: Elevating a Scaling Startup to Global Heights"

"A wordmark, word mark, or logotype is a distinct text-only typographic treatment of the name of a company, institution, or product name used for purposes of identification and branding"
other version

"A wordmark, also known as a logotype or word mark, is a unique typographic representation of the name of a company, institution, or product. It's employed solely using text for the purpose of identity and branding."

“A wordmark, also known as a logotype or word mark, is a unique typographic representation of the name of a company, institution, or product. It’s employed solely using text for the purpose of identity and branding.”Stripe'ın, Etsy'nin veya Casper'ın logosundan etkilendiniz mi? Basit bir tipografik parçanın nasıl bu kadar çok kimliğe sahip olabileceğini, nasıl bu kadar özel ve kişisel hissettirebileceğini anlatıyor.your version

"A wordmark, or logotype, is a specific typographic portrayal of a company, institution, or product name, designed exclusively with text to serve branding and identification purposes." Have you ever been captivated by the logos of Stripe, Etsy, or Casper? It's fascinating how a simple piece of typography can possess so much identity, how it can convey something so unique and personal."

Are you looking for a designer that is able to create a true persona, not through complex distracting icons, but through the magic of typographic detailing, colouring and kerning ?
 you version
"Are you in search of a designer who can craft an authentic identity, not by using intricate, distracting symbols, but through the subtleties of typographical details, color schemes, and kerning?"

We are too.
you version
"So are we."

As I have always said, observing ads every morning in the tube will teach you more about design than any book, any video or any university course, because by the time this book is written, the design world has already moved forward.
your version

As I've consistently maintained, studying advertisements on the subway each morning imparts more knowledge about design than any book, video, or academic course could. This is because the realm of design progresses rapidly, and by the time a book is published, the industry has already evolved.

We might be the one team you need.
you version
"We could be the only team you're looking for."

You’ll be prompted to answer your security question when we need to verify your identity, so be sure to choose a question only you know the answer to.

Kimliğinizi doğrulamamız gerektiğinde güvenlik sorunuzun cevabını vermeniz istenecektir, bu yüzden sadece sizin bilebileceğiniz bir soruyu seçtiğinizden emin olun.
